tr.td: 1 tablet (400 mg) by mouth every 6 hours as needed
Amlodipine (as amlodipine besylate) 2.5 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (2.5 mg) by mouth once daily
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
Live attenuated Human alphaherpesvirus 3 only vaccine product
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product

ul.li: Patient will report reduced daytime sleepiness as measured by the Epworth Sleepiness Scale within 3 months.
Patient will use CPAP device for at least 4 hours per night on 70% of nights over the next 3 months.
Patient will report improved sleep quality and fewer nighttime awakenings over the next 3 months.
Patient will implement recommended lifestyle changes (diet, exercise, sodium reduction) to help control blood pressure.
Maintain hemoglobin A1c below 5.7% through diabetes self-management.
Achieve and maintain a 5% reduction in body weight to reduce risk of diabetes progression.
Adopt a balanced diet and regular physical activity as part of diabetes self-management plan.

tr.td: Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported
Blood pressure panel with all children optional
1 tablet (400 mg) by mouth every 6 hours as needed

Patient will use CPAP device for at least 4 hours per night on 70% of nights over the next 3 months.
Patient will report improved sleep quality and fewer nighttime awakenings over the next 3 months.
Patient will implement recommended lifestyle changes (diet, exercise, sodium reduction) to help control blood pressure.
Maintain hemoglobin A1c below 5.7% through diabetes self-management.
Achieve and maintain a 5% reduction in body weight to reduce risk of diabetes progression.
Adopt a balanced diet and regular physical activity as part of diabetes self-management plan.
